name: Quiche-Grits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle ham and cheese on bottom of unbaked crust.
2. Beat the remaining ingredients together in a bowl.
3. Pour the mixture over the cheese and ham in the pie shell.
4. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-50 minutes, until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
Note: Recipe from "One Million Recipes CD" busted by Judy R.
